title: feat: paid-only for grok (xai), elevenmusic, wan-fast
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: The VIP lounge expands
gist.blurb: We've updated the access tiers for some of our most popular heavy-hitter models. Grok, ElevenMusic, and Wan-Fast are now exclusive perks for our premium supporters, ensuring top-tier performance when you need it most.
gist.summary: Updated access tiers for Grok-imagine, ElevenMusic, and Wan-Fast to ensure reliable performance and fair usage across the platform.
gist.impact: These high-demand models are now exclusive to premium tiers, providing dedicated capacity and better stability for our supporters.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a friendly host at a cozy VIP garden lounge, welcoming users. A velvet rope made of vines and glowing premium tokens.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bowtie, standing next to a velvet rope made of green vines outside a glowing VIP garden lounge. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. A chunky retro sign reads 'VIP' in pixel font. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
